mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_reminder (userId, deviceId, message, triggerTime, repeatType, repeatDays, status, createTime) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{message}, #{triggerTime}, #{repeatType}, #{repeatDays}, 'active', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_reminder SET status = #{status} WHERE reminderId = #{reminderId}
UPDATE sys_reminder SET triggerTime = #{triggerTime} WHERE reminderId = #{reminderId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_reminder WHERE userId = #{userId} AND deviceId = #{deviceId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY triggerTime ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_reminder WHERE userId = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY triggerTime ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_reminder WHERE userId = #{userId} AND status = 'active'
